02

Colour Palette

Brand Colours
Navy #1A3669 Primary
Gold #C5A03C Accent
Slate #64748B Default UI
Ocean #0EA5E9 Preset
Forest #10B981 Preset
Midnight #6366F1 Preset
Dark #0F1428 Dark Mode
Rose #E11D48 Preset

Navy and Gold form the primary brand pair used across all formal materials. The extended palette — Ocean, Forest, Midnight, and Rose — provides flexibility for data visualisations, UI themes, and digital applications.
